dimensions.name: typescript_check
dimensions.description: TypeScript strict mode type checking with no emit

dimensions.name: next_build
dimensions.command: cd web && npx next build 2>&1; echo "exit:$?"
dimensions.description: Next.js production build succeeds without errors

dimensions.name: lint
dimensions.command: cd web && npx eslint src/ 2>&1; echo "exit:$?"
dimensions.description: ESLint passes on all source files
